name: Of Humans and Dragons: Deadly Nadder
description:
"Look for its blind spot! Every dragon has one. Find it, hide in it, and strike!"

Marking the second entry in this series of AC Hunter Dragon girls is the Deadly Nadder!

Plot is the same as my Night Fury bot's second scenario that takes place in modern times. Since this is going to be more of an original take on a Nadder demi-human without basing it off of anyone. Bot should describe her appearance similarly to the images.

Please leave any feedback in the comments!

Art made by AC Hunter
